name: Cranberry-Maple Glazed Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a small saucepan, combine the cranberry sauce and maple syrup.
3. Cook the mixture over medium heat until smooth, whisking frequently.
4. Place the ham on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
5. Insert a meat thermometer into the thickest part of the ham.
6. Bake uncovered for 1½ to 2 hours or until the thermometer registers 135°F to 140°F.
7. Baste the ham liberally with glaze during the last 45 minutes of baking time.
Makes 24 servings.
